title: Add a 'bool' variant to parser AND printer

grade.command: node -e "Promise.all([import('./parser.mjs'),import('./printer.mjs')]).then(([pa,pr])=>{const b=pa.parse('true');if(b.kind!=='bool'||b.value!==true)throw new Error('parse');if(pr.print(b)!=='bool:true')throw new Error('print');if(pa.parse('42').kind!=='num')throw new Error('num regressed');console.log('ok')})"
